Portal_Chamber: ^You are in a dark room dominated by a large, rectangular portal humming with neon blue and pink light. Strange symbols pulse along its frame. The air crackles faintly.
Clearing_with_Doors: ^You emerge into a grassy clearing surrounded by dense jungle foliage. Small, glowing blue plants dot the ground. Two simple arched doorways stand ahead.
Waterfall_Shrine: ^This small stone structure is built into a mossy embankment. A gentle waterfall cascades down one side into a clear pool. The air is damp and cool.
Moonlit_Ledge: ^You stand on a stone platform built high on a cliff face. Below, water reflects the bright moonlight. It's quiet and somewhat eerie. A passage leads into the cliff.
^Look for a way down the cliff
Ravine_Bridge: ^Inside the cliff, a rickety wooden bridge spans a dark, deep ravine. Torches flicker, casting long shadows. The sound of dripping water echoes.
Crash_Site: ^In a gloomier part of the jungle, you find the wreckage of a small airplane half-buried in the earth. Glowing plants grow around it. A path leads up a rocky incline.
Serpent_Cave: ^This cave chamber glows with an orange light. Large, snake-like golden patterns are etched into the floor, shimmering faintly. Keys lie scattered among them.
^Follow a tunnel deeper into the caves
Grassy_Knoll_Entrance: ^You are on a gentle, grassy slope. A single stone doorway is set into the side of the hill, similar to the ones in the clearing.
Red_Cliff_Ledge: ^You're on a ledge of reddish rock under a sunset sky. A glowing key symbol pulses near the edge. Paths lead along the cliff face and downwards.
^Follow the path towards a cave entrance
^Look for a way up towards the moonlight
Golden_Hoard_Cave: ^A dazzling pile of golden coins and artifacts fills this part of the cave, illuminated by an unseen light source. An arched doorway stands at the back.
Blue_Gate_Cave: ^This section of the cave network has dark red rock walls. A distinct, glowing blue energy gate blocks a passage.
Lower_Waterfall_Cave: ^Water cascades brightly from an opening high above, falling into a pool in this cave. The light refracts through the spray.
^Look for a way up towards the shrine
Key_Platform: ^You stand on a raised stone platform surrounded by greenery. A glowing green key symbol hovers above a pedestal. An archway leads out.
^Take the passage towards the Blue Gate
